caption:
The fluorescent lights hummed softly, but my focus was on the dim desk lamp lighting up his notebook. 📚💡

I adjusted the collar of my navy blazer, feeling the cool silk of my blouse against my skin. He was the top student, always asking deep questions, but tonight the air felt thicker than usual. I leaned back against the wooden desk, the tight pencil skirt hugging my hips, and watched him squint at his papers. 'One more question,' he whispered. My heart raced, a warm heat pooling in my chest. I reached forward, my fingers brushing his hair, the scent of my vanilla perfume mingling with the old books in the room. 'Sit closer,' I murmured, my voice dropping an octave. He did, and suddenly the boundary between teacher and student blurred into something far more thrilling. The city lights outside the blinds reflected in my dark eyes, and I smiled, knowing this lecture was far from ordinary. 🔥💋 #TeacherSecrets #LateNightStudy #CurvesAndBooks #UniversityVibes #SecretLectures
